name: dateDiff
description: Determines the integer difference between two dates. If `date2` is less than `date1`, it will return a negative number.  Enclose string constant dates in quotation marks, or it will be interpreted as a date/time object, resulting in an incorrect value.

params.name: datepart
params.description:
String that specifies the units in which to count.  `yyyy`: Year 
 `q`: Quarter
 `m`: Months
 `y`: Day of year (same as `d`)
 `d`: Day
 `w`: Weekdays (CF2018+, otherwise same as `ww` in CF2016 or less and Lucee)
 `ww`: Week
 `h`: Hour
 `n`: Minute
 `s`: Second
 **Note:** The mask `w` as weekdays is only valid for the 2018 release of ColdFusion. For 2016 and earlier versions of ColdFusion, `w` returns the number of weeks and is the same as `ww`.

params.name: date1
params.description:
The first date (100AD-9999AD) to diff.
Can be either a string or a date object, whereas the member function only accepts the latter.

params.name: date2
params.description:
The second date (100AD-9999AD) to diff.
Can be either a string or a date object. 
 The member function does not accept this parameter.

coldfusion.notes: Member function is available in CF11+. Datepart `w` behaves different in CF2018+.

lucee.notes: Member function is available in Lucee4.5+. The Lucee member function diffs dates in the opposite direction (+/-) than the Adobe CF member function. See the example below.

examples.title: dateDiff Example
examples.description: Find the difference between two dates.

examples.title: How old are they?
examples.description: Calculates a person's age based on a variable birthDate which contains a date. Uses the now function to get current date.

examples.title: `w` vs `ww` In CF2018+ and below CF2016/Lucee
examples.description: Note the different behavior between CF 2018 and below CF2016 and Lucee.
examples.code: date1 = CreateDate(2018,10,21) ; date2 = CreateDate(2018,10,31) ; writeOutput( dateDiff(

examples.title: dateDiff member function
examples.description: Note the different behavior between ColdFusion and Lucee.
examples.code: date1 = CreateDate(2018,10,21) ; date2 = CreateDate(2018,10,31) ; writeoutput( date2.diff("d",date1) ) ;
